channel.title: Go Humble! RSS Games
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle games bundles!

item.title: Mexican Entertainment System Bundle
item.content:encoded:
The all-new Mexican Entertainment System Bundle will boot up your love for exceptional Mexican-made games! Unwind and relax with Lonesome Village, a cozy puzzle-solving life sim without combat where you’ll save the village from nefarious evils. Turn heads, drop jaws, and let your light shine in RKGK/Rakugaki, an action-packed single-layer 3D platformer. Get stuck on A Tiny Sticker Tale, a cozy lil’ adventure about changing the world using the power of stickers! Join our fiesta of great Mexican-led games before they’re gone and help support Doctors Without Borders with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 22nd, 2027

item.title: Dead Rising: Shop 'Til You Drop Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Grab a bat, bow, teddy bear explosive, or… shopping cart? Everything and anything is a weapon in Dead Rising, your journey to slay gigantic oceans of zombies in tight domestic settings. Play as freelance photographer Frank West as he uses his charm and creativity to survive. Experience Dead Rising Deluxe Remaster, Frank West’s first adventure with a new coat of paint, at our base-tier pricing—and get the complete Dead Rising legacy collection when you purchase our higher bundle tier. Unlock the ultimate zombie-horde-hunting collection and help support T1D with your purchase.

Keys expire. Please redeem before November 20, 2026

item.title: PLAYISM Publisher Bundle - 2026
item.content:encoded:
Play games that pack a punch from PLAYISM! Add a little wacky to your life with DEEEER Simulator: Your Average Everyday Deer Game, the “Slow-life town destruction game”. Experience Bright Memory: Infinite, the lightning-fast fusion of the FPS and action genres. Or escape an endless underground passageway using only your observational skills in The Exit 8. Pay what you want for the hottest titles by PLAYISM, and help support War Child when you shop with Humble Bundle!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before May 20th, 2027.

item.title: Fore! A Golf Games Bundle
item.content:encoded:
The Masters may be over, but your journey to golf champion is just beginning! Hit the links and practice your swing with this bundle of golfing games made for passionate golfers and newbies alike. Traverse new dimensions of golf and design mind-bending challenges in 4D Golf! Swing your way through a dungeon, fight monsters, and escape traps in Dungeon Golf! Unwind while playing mini golf through a picturesque, calming world in A Little Golf Journey! There are even more golf games to choose from in this bundle, so act now to get them all under par—at the low price of your choosing, that is—and support Breakthrough T1D with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 15th, 2027

item.title: MECHA MANIA
item.content:encoded:
Be honest: you’ve always wanted to jump inside the cockpit of a giant battle robot and join the fight to save humanity. We know you have, which is why we’ve designed this bundle full of mecha madness video games just for you! Design and customize your Mechanical Assault Skeleton Suit and fight giant alien beasts in M.A.S.S. Builder! Build a base and soup up your mech as you take on the role of veteran pilot Clem in the Wild West-influenced action game Bounty Star! Join a team of mining security robot pilots and investigate a solar system of mysterious alien worlds in Vox Machinae! All of these and more are included in this bundle of mecha mayhem, so grab it now at the price of your choosing and support World Central Kitchen with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before May 15th, 2027.

item.title: Your Move: Turn Based Games
item.content:encoded:
Whether you’re a master strategist or just looking for some idle fun exploring an exciting world, there’s a turn-based game out there just for you. As a matter of fact, it’s probably included in our new bundle full of RPGs and strategy games with stories that flow based on the decisions you make! Bring a set of fantastical digital miniatures to life in Moonbreaker, a tactical skirmish game set inside a universe created by Brandon Sanderson! Use the power of lucid dreaming to navigate a labyrinth of nightmares, battles, and puzzles in Deep Sleep: Labyrinth of the Forsaken! Traverse underground caverns, battle adversaries, and solve the mysteries of Dungeons of Aether! There’s a lot more to explore in this bundle of turn-based games, so grab them now at the price of your choosing, and help support Hilarity for Charity with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 13th, 2027

item.title: VR Kiwi Complete Collection
item.content:encoded:
Great VR games from across the Atlantic have arrived with the VRKiwi Complete Collection Bundle! Explore a rich Caribbean island teeming with beauty and dangers in Pirates VR: Jolly Roger. Face off against cursed pirates, undead, skeletons, and more in exciting encounters that only VR can deliver. Step into the hunting boots of the ultimate sharpshooter and claim your trophy kills with unmatched realism in Virtual Hunter, or try to keep your balance in Stilt, the next evolution in platforming insanity! Pay what you want for a super-charged collection of VR titles and help support Team Rubicon with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 13th, 2027

item.title: Speak to the Manager
item.content:encoded:
We’re offering you a new role in ‘Strategic Fun Management’ with an epic bundle of fantastic goal-based strategy games and more! Make your queen proud in Empires of the Undergrowth, the unforgettable strategy RTS where you expand your earthly empire as a colony of ants; establish an interstellar home for human-envious robots in The Colonists; or choose a cleaner experience with Good Company, a robot-based management sim where the goal is to become the most optimized company in the world. Take control of any situation and have a blast doing so with the all-new Speak to the Manager Bundle before it’s gone.

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 8th, 2027

item.title: Train Sim World 6: First Class Ticket Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Calling all conductors: Power up those engines and honk those whistles, because you won’t want to miss this fantastic Train Sim World 6 bundle! This collection of game coupons and DLC is your first class ticket to ride a great selection of all-new train lines and expand the Train Sim World map!

Get half-off coupons for standard, deluxe, and special editions of the main Train Sim World 6 game, plus a wealth of extras, like Diesel Legends of the Great Western, Los Angeles’ San Bernardino line, and the extra festive Holiday Train Pack! Grab all this and more for the price of your choice, and support the suicide prevention organization Campaign Against Living Miserably with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before August 6th, 2026

item.title: Sharp Shooters Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Ready your aim, the Sharp Shooters Bundle is in range! Unholster Strike Force Heroes, the multiplayer-centric classic arena shooter rebuilt with modern mechanics, Outriders, the bloody and brutal shooter that mixes quick gunplay, destructive powers, and deep RPG systems to create a dynamic hybrid experience, or set your sights on Way of the Hunter, the critically acclaimed hunting sim with unmatched realism and wildlife diversity! Try these games and more with the Sharp Shooters Bundle, and help support Charity: Water when you shop with Humble Bundle.

Keys Expire. Please redeem all before May 6th, 2027

item.title: Humble 15 for $15 - April 2026
item.content:encoded:
Looking for great games at low prices? Unlock 15 amazing titles for only $15 today. Grab your best friend and dive into Chip ‘N Clawz vs. The Brainioids, a colorful local multiplayer extravaganza where you’ll face off against freaky Brains-in-Jars aliens. Pinball meets action and mystery in Pinball Spire, a fast-paced pinballvania experiment that slaps! Or step into the boots of the ‘big bad boss’ and rethink what it means to be the enemy in The Dark Queen of Mortholme. Plus, your purchase helps support the Starlight Children’s Foundation.

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 6th, 2027

item.title: Tower Defense 2
item.content:encoded:
Impenetrable defenses and unbeatable prices—pay what you want for eight outstanding tower defense games like Thronefall, with its gorgeously simple visuals alongside addicting city-building and tower defense gameplay to deliver countless hours of intense battles. Affogato, the deliciously inventive RPG and tower defense hybrid that drops players into the shoes of a sorceress managing a cafe. And Orcs Must Die! 3 Complete Bundle, where you’ll burn, bruise, slice, and zap hordes of orcs! Plus, a portion of your purchase helps support Active Minds!

Keys expire. Please redeem before May 1st, 2027

item.title: Destiny 2: Expansions Bundle 2026
item.content:encoded: Get ready to hop around the solar system, defending humanity and its allies from Darkness with this bundle made for anyone who wants the full Destiny 2 experience! This bundle includes the latest DLC collection, the Year of Prophecy Ultimate Edition, where you'll head out to the mysterious planetoid of Kepler in The Edge of Fate, uncovering a dire prophecy of extinction, and ally with the leaders of the criminal underworld to save the galaxy in Renegades. Not to mention chase down the Witness to prevent the apocalypse in The Final Shape and defeat Light-bearing Hive in The Witch Queen. You'll also get content like the 30th Anniversary Pack—packed with fan‑favorite activities and rewards. You can get all this and more in this bundle—plus a 25% off coupon for Bungie's newest game Marathon! Every purchase at the price of your choice supports the Bungie Foundation.

item.title: Sovereign Sandbox Bundle
item.description: Thy kingdom come will be done
item.content:encoded:
Construct an empire your way with the all-new Sovereign Sandbox Bundle! Lead the Lovecraftian believers to salvation through unique city-building mechanics in Worshippers of Cthulhu, take on the role of Park Manager and develop a prehistoric animal park (that doesn’t threaten humanity) in Prehistoric Kingdom, and create without limits as you harness the all-mighty power of the creator in The Universim. Pay what you want for great games and help support War Child with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before April 29th, 2027
